ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Electrical Engineering Projects and Tools) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "score" REAL /* Actual score of the student in the course */,
  "predicted_score" TEXT /* Predicted score of the student in the course */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "assignment_score" REAL /* Score of the student in assignments */,
  "project_score" REAL /* Score of the student in projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "predicted_score" TEXT /* Predicted score of the student in the course */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "required_score" REAL /* Minimum score required in the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor pair */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., lecturer, teaching assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course description */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "learning_outcomes" TEXT /* Learning outcomes of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_descriptions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curriculum" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "curriculum" TEXT /* Curriculum for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Syllabus for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., textbook, online course, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student or instructor (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average score, completion rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "at_risk_students" (
  "at_risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each at-risk student */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the student (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("at_risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_risk_students_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_risk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
